parents.subject: LU-19460 build: ldiskfs: updates for kernel v6.17

commit.subject: LU-19724 build: v6.18 - inode_just_drop
commit.message:
LU-19724 build: v6.18 - inode_just_drop

v6.17-rc1-37-gf99b3917789d
  fs: rename generic_delete_inode() and generic_drop_inode()

Use inode_just_drop() and inode_generic_drop() and provide:
  inode_just_drop() wrapper for generic_delete_inode() and
  inode_generic_drop() wrapper for generic_drop_inode()
for older kernels.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I1c62c7ae1a10fdc388d159c399bfcd2dcf3299b0
